Text: Is something the matter, <If(PlayerParameter(4))>Mistress<Else/>Master</If> <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,2)/>? Shall we call off the training exercise?
Now that you've learned the basics, it's time to put your knowledge to the test. Overcome this final challenge, and your training will be complete!

Are you prepared for your final challenge?
Should you feel less than confident, you may wish to revisit the basics.

Exit the training exercise?
